/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_instrumentation.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_instrumentation.dir/traces/critical_traces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_instrumentation.dir/traces/du_traces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_instrumentation.dir/traces/ru_traces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_instrumentation.dir/traces/up_traces.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_instrumentation.dir/traces/ofh_traces.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_instrumentation.a
